articles.author: Doric Sam
articles.title: Did Fever's Caitlin Clark Decision Violate WNBA Rules on Injury Reports? - Bleacher Report
articles.description: Indiana Fever star guard Caitlin Clark missed Wednesday's game against the Portland Fire due to a back injury, but she may have landed in some hot water.
articles.content:
Indiana Fever star guard Caitlin Clark 
missed Wednesday's game against the Portland Fire due to a back injury, but she may have landed in some hot water.
